TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Mayhuman = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Mayhuman. 68 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 183 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 96% niqan 175 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 4% niqan 8 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal87%, Saysiyat7%, Cou1%, ni rahuq na o1%. Hangan alang Hangan alang alang Hwa-yueyn(Mayhuman) Thuyang alang Pnseanak alang Alang Hwa-yueyn ga maagmaxan mniq Atayal ni Saysyac dha klgan nii. Nniqan alang Nniqan Sin-cuseyn Wu-fung-syang Hwa-yueyn-cun. Klbangan Llbangan Hraan hidaw alang He-tow yaa bi 4km, mquri hunac Teyn-hu-san, narac siyaw qsiya ayug Pi-ray-si. Kndkilan lnglingay Nniqan llingay knbaraw o 450m Kklaan ppanan Pgkla ppanan rulu Mgriq rulu: Tduwa muda Seng-taw 122(Nan-cing kung-ru) paah Cu-tung mkala bukuy do meigi tqiri hakaw paru Wu-fung, mlutuc elug Cu 62, kika dhuq alang Hwa-yueyn da. Mlutuc syusan teync Mlutuc teyn-c ti-tu. teyn-c ti-tu alang. Nniqan seejiq alang Klgan seejiq alang Atayal. Skari kari Skari kari kari Atayal, kari Saysyac, kari Tlu. Snhiyaan Snhiyan cung-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Pnyahan alang Hwa-yueyn-cun ga ida snpuan Meyhoman ni Teyn-hu dha(U1) alang Atayal, pusu bi alang o ga Meyhoman, ida Hwa-yueyn-cun uri, hiyi seejiq sayang o msdalih hari 1000. Kari AtayalMeyhoman ksun ga gisu nniqan " knhmuc empahung", mnniq alang Teyn-hu seejiq o bukuy kwan-fu do, kndadax Syow-Rwan mquri Wu-fung S-ru kska elug Qway-san na Ri-yueyn. Pay-s dha alang thjil hini. (U1)ay Ida neAtayal Cooli, rudan seejiq tnealang o yaa bi brah hmrinas 200 hngkwasan siida,ida pnaah yayung Ta-an-si sttu mkala ddgiyaq meiyah dhuq hini.Pusu balay mnniq hini seuxal o Saysyac, dha dha o ida mnuda pspais, hici do mssahug da ka dhiya. Manu ka Saysyac o kbrxun na Atayal ka dxgal, dha klgan seejiq nii o mstrung ka rsrisaw ni wauwa msdangai da. Kana ka Atayal Wu-fung-syaw o rahuq na S-ru ni Syuey-pa dha nii o Sqoliq Tayal, ida mnuda saw nii kika tduwa mniq dxgal Saysyac. Kklaan rrigaw Pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang. Pnyahan bnatas Qtaan bnatas Gaya kndusan Atayal- Tnhjilan ni knrnaan alang.
S.PHON: = majńßuman = gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn u*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč majńßuman. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan * ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, sajsijat*%, ¶ou*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč ńßwa-ju…ôn(majńßuman) tńßujaŇč alaŇč pns…ôanak alaŇč alaŇč ńßwa-ju…ôn ga maagmaxan mniq atajal ni sajsja ¶ dńßa klgan nii. nniqan alaŇč nniqan sin- ¶us…ôn wu-*uŇč-sjaŇč ńßwa-ju…ôn- ¶un. klbaŇčan llbaŇčan ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw alaŇč ńß…ô-tow jaa bi *km, mqu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ t…ôn-ńßu-san, na…ĺa ¶ sijaw qsija ajug pi-…ĺaj-si. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj nniqan lliŇčaj knba…ĺaw o ***m kklaan ppanan pgkla ppanan …ĺulu mg…ĺiq …ĺulu: tduwa muda s…ôŇč-taw ***(nan- ¶iŇč kuŇč-…ĺu) paańß ¶u-tuŇč mkala bukuj do m…ôigi tqi…ĺi ńßakaw pa…ĺu wu-*uŇč, mlutu ¶ …ôlug ¶u **, kika dńßuq alaŇč ńßwa-ju…ôn da. mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn ¶ mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu. t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. nniqan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč atajal. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi atajal, ka…ĺi sajsja ¶, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijaan snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč pnjańßan alaŇč ńßwa-ju…ôn- ¶un ga ida snpuan m…ôńßoman ni t…ôn-ńßu dńßa(u*) alaŇč atajal, pusu bi alaŇč o ga m…ôńßoman, ida ńßwa-ju…ôn- ¶un u…ĺi, ńßiji s…ô…ô…üiq sajaŇč o msdalińß ńßa…ĺi ****. ka…ĺi atajalm…ôńßoman ksun ga gisu nniqan " knńßmu ¶ …ômpańßuŇč", mnniq alaŇč t…ôn-ńßu s…ô…ô…üiq o bukuj kwan-*u do, kndadax sjow-…ĺwan mqu…ĺi wu-*uŇč s-…ĺu kska …ôlug qwaj-san na …ĺi-ju…ôn. paj-s dńßa alaŇč tńß…üil ńßini. (u*)aj ida n…ôatajal ¶ooli, …ĺudan s…ô…ô…üiq tn…ôalaŇč o jaa bi b…ĺańß ńßm…ĺinas *** ńßŇčkwasan siida,ida pnaańß jajuŇč ta-an-si sttu mkala ddgijaq m…ôijańß dńßuq ńßini.pusu balaj mnniq ńßini s…ôuxal o sajsja ¶, dńßa dńßa o ida mnuda pspais, ńßi ¶i do mssańßug da ka dńßija. manu ka sajsja ¶ o kb…ĺxun na atajal ka dxgal, dńßa klgan s…ô…ô…üiq nii o mst…ĺuŇč ka …ĺs…ĺisaw ni wauwa msdaŇčai da. kana ka atajal wu-*uŇč-sjaw o …ĺańßuq na s-…ĺu ni sju…ô-pa dńßa nii o sqoliq tajal, ida mnuda saw nii kika tduwa mniq dxgal sajsja ¶. kklaan …ĺ…ĺigaw pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč. pnjańßan bnatas qtaan bnatas gaja kndusan atajal- tnńß…üilan ni kn…ĺnaan alaŇč.
S.FORM: = Mayhuman = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Mayhuman. 68 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 183 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 96% niqan 175 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 4% niqan 8 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal87%, Saysiyat7%, Cou1%, ni rahuq na o1%. Hangan alang Hangan alang alang Hwa-yueyn(Mayhuman) Thuyang alang Pnseanak alang Alang Hwa-yueyn ga maagmaxan mniq Atayal ni Saysyac dha klgan nii. Nniqan alang Nniqan Sin-cuseyn Wu-fung-syang Hwa-yueyn-cun. Klbangan Llbangan Hraan hidaw alang He-tow yaa bi 4km, mquri hunac Teyn-hu-san, narac siyaw qsiya ayug Pi-ray-si. Kndkilan lnglingay Nniqan llingay knbaraw o 450m Kklaan ppanan Pgkla ppanan rulu Mgriq rulu: Tduwa muda Seng-taw 122(Nan-cing kung-ru) paah Cu-tung mkala bukuy do meigi tqiri hakaw paru Wu-fung, mlutuc elug Cu 62, kika dhuq alang Hwa-yueyn da. Mlutuc syusan teync Mlutuc teyn-c ti-tu. teyn-c ti-tu alang. Nniqan seejiq alang Klgan seejiq alang Atayal. Skari kari Skari kari kari Atayal, kari Saysyac, kari Tlu. Snhiyaan Snhiyan cung-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Pnyahan alang Hwa-yueyn-cun ga ida snpuan Meyhoman ni Teyn-hu dha(U1) alang Atayal, pusu bi alang o ga Meyhoman, ida Hwa-yueyn-cun uri, hiyi seejiq sayang o msdalih hari 1000. Kari AtayalMeyhoman ksun ga gisu nniqan " knhmuc empahung", mnniq alang Teyn-hu seejiq o bukuy kwan-fu do, kndadax Syow-Rwan mquri Wu-fung S-ru kska elug Qway-san na Ri-yueyn. Pay-s dha alang thjil hini. (U1)ay Ida neAtayal Cooli, rudan seejiq tnealang o yaa bi brah hmrinas 200 hngkwasan siida,ida pnaah yayung Ta-an-si sttu mkala ddgiyaq meiyah dhuq hini.Pusu balay mnniq hini seuxal o Saysyac, dha dha o ida mnuda pspais, hici do mssahug da ka dhiya. Manu ka Saysyac o kbrxun na Atayal ka dxgal, dha klgan seejiq nii o mstrung ka rsrisaw ni wauwa msdangai da. Kana ka Atayal Wu-fung-syaw o rahuq na S-ru ni Syuey-pa dha nii o Sqoliq Tayal, ida mnuda saw nii kika tduwa mniq dxgal Saysyac. Kklaan rrigaw Pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang. Pnyahan bnatas Qtaan bnatas Gaya kndusan Atayal- Tnhjilan ni knrnaan alang.
S.PHON: = majńßuman = gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn u*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč majńßuman. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan * ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, sajsijat*%, ¶ou*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč ńßwa-ju…ôn(majńßuman) tńßujaŇč alaŇč pns…ôanak alaŇč alaŇč ńßwa-ju…ôn ga maagmaxan mniq atajal ni sajsja ¶ dńßa klgan nii. nniqan alaŇč nniqan sin- ¶us…ôn wu-*uŇč-sjaŇč ńßwa-ju…ôn- ¶un. klbaŇčan llbaŇčan ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw alaŇč ńß…ô-tow jaa bi *km, mqu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ t…ôn-ńßu-san, na…ĺa ¶ sijaw qsija ajug pi-…ĺaj-si. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj nniqan lliŇčaj knba…ĺaw o ***m kklaan ppanan pgkla ppanan …ĺulu mg…ĺiq …ĺulu: tduwa muda s…ôŇč-taw ***(nan- ¶iŇč kuŇč-…ĺu) paańß ¶u-tuŇč mkala bukuj do m…ôigi tqi…ĺi ńßakaw pa…ĺu wu-*uŇč, mlutu ¶ …ôlug ¶u **, kika dńßuq alaŇč ńßwa-ju…ôn da. mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn ¶ mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu. t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. nniqan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč atajal. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi atajal, ka…ĺi sajsja ¶, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijaan snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč pnjańßan alaŇč ńßwa-ju…ôn- ¶un ga ida snpuan m…ôńßoman ni t…ôn-ńßu dńßa(u*) alaŇč atajal, pusu bi alaŇč o ga m…ôńßoman, ida ńßwa-ju…ôn- ¶un u…ĺi, ńßiji s…ô…ô…üiq sajaŇč o msdalińß ńßa…ĺi ****. ka…ĺi atajalm…ôńßoman ksun ga gisu nniqan " knńßmu ¶ …ômpańßuŇč", mnniq alaŇč t…ôn-ńßu s…ô…ô…üiq o bukuj kwan-*u do, kndadax sjow-…ĺwan mqu…ĺi wu-*uŇč s-…ĺu kska …ôlug qwaj-san na …ĺi-ju…ôn. paj-s dńßa alaŇč tńß…üil ńßini. (u*)aj ida n…ôatajal ¶ooli, …ĺudan s…ô…ô…üiq tn…ôalaŇč o jaa bi b…ĺańß ńßm…ĺinas *** ńßŇčkwasan siida,ida pnaańß jajuŇč ta-an-si sttu mkala ddgijaq m…ôijańß dńßuq ńßini.pusu balaj mnniq ńßini s…ôuxal o sajsja ¶, dńßa dńßa o ida mnuda pspais, ńßi ¶i do mssańßug da ka dńßija. manu ka sajsja ¶ o kb…ĺxun na atajal ka dxgal, dńßa klgan s…ô…ô…üiq nii o mst…ĺuŇč ka …ĺs…ĺisaw ni wauwa msdaŇčai da. kana ka atajal wu-*uŇč-sjaw o …ĺańßuq na s-…ĺu ni sju…ô-pa dńßa nii o sqoliq tajal, ida mnuda saw nii kika tduwa mniq dxgal sajsja ¶. kklaan …ĺ…ĺigaw pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč. pnjańßan bnatas qtaan bnatas gaja kndusan atajal- tnńß…üilan ni kn…ĺnaan alaŇč.
